heading: Additions to toxics release inventory
label: 8921 Additions to toxics release inventory
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (f) of amended , The Public Health and Welfare.section 7321 of Pub. L. 116–92section 7321 of Pub. L. 116–92section 11023 of Title 42
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (f) of amended , The Public Health and Welfare.section 7321 of Pub. L. 116–92section 7321 of Pub. L. 116–92section 11023 of Title 42

children.heading: Definition of toxics release inventory
children.label: a Definition of toxics release inventory
children.text: In this section, the term “toxics release inventory” means the list of toxic chemicals subject to the requirements of .section 11023(c) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: Perfluorooctanoic acid (commonly referred to as “PFOA”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 335–67–1).

children.label: B
children.text: The salts associated with the chemical described in subparagraph (A) (Chemical Abstracts Service Nos. 3825–26–1, 335–95–5, and 68141–02–6).

children.label: C
children.text: Perfluorooctane sulfonic acid (commonly referred to as “PFOS”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 1763–23–1).

children.label: D
children.text: The salts associated with the chemical described in subparagraph (C) (Chemical Abstracts Service Nos. 2795–39–3, 29457–72–5, 56773–42–3, 29081–56–9, and 70225–14–8).

children.label: i
children.text: listed as an active chemical substance in the February 2019 update to the inventory under ; andsection 2607(b)(1) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: section 721.9582 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations; or

children.label: II
children.text: section 721.10536 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.label: F
children.text: Hexafluoropropylene oxide dimer acid (commonly referred to as “GenX”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 13252–13–6).

children.label: G
children.text: The compound associated with the chemical described in subparagraph (F) identified by Chemical Abstracts Service No. 62037–80–3.

children.label: H
children.text: Perfluorononanoic acid (commonly referred to as “PFNA”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 375–95–1).

children.label: I
children.text: Perfluorohexanesulfonic acid (commonly referred to as “PFHxS”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 355–46–4).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the threshold for reporting the chemicals described in paragraph (1) under is 100 pounds.section 11023 of title 42

children.label: i
children.text: determine whether revision of the threshold under subparagraph (A) is warranted for any chemical described in paragraph (1); and

children.label: ii
children.text: if the Administrator determines a revision to be warranted under clause (i), initiate a revision under .section 11023(f)(2) of title 42

children.heading: Final toxicity value
children.label: i Final toxicity value
children.text: The date on which the Administrator finalizes a toxicity value for the perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances.

children.heading: Significant new use rule
children.label: ii Significant new use rule
children.text: The date on which the Administrator makes a covered determination for the perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances.

children.heading: Addition to existing significant new use rule
children.label: iii Addition to existing significant new use rule
children.text: The date on which the perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances is added to a list of substances covered by a covered determination.

children.heading: Addition as active chemical substance
children.label: iv Addition as active chemical substance
I
children.text: added to the list published under paragraph (1) of and designated as an active chemical substance under paragraph (5)(A) of such section; orsection 2607(b) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: designated as an active chemical substance on such list under paragraph (5)(B) of such section.

children.heading: Covered determination
children.label: B Covered determination
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, a covered determination is a determination made, by rule, under that a use of a perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances is a significant new use (except such a determination made in connection with a determination described in section 2604(a)(3)(B) or ).section 2604(a)(2) of this titlesection 2604(a)(3)(C) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), notwithstanding subsection (f)(1) of , the threshold for reporting under such the substances and classes of substances included in the toxics release inventory under paragraph (1) is 100 pounds.section 11023 of title 42section 11023 of title 42

children.label: i
children.text: determine whether revision of the threshold under subparagraph (A) is warranted for the substance or class of substances; and

children.label: ii
children.text: if the Administrator determines a revision to be warranted under clause (i), initiate a revision under .section 11023(f)(2) of title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Administrator shall determine whether the substances and classes of substances described in paragraph (2) meet any one of the criteria described in for inclusion in the toxics release inventory.December 20, 2019section 11023(d)(2) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: perfluoro[(2-pentafluoroethoxy-ethoxy)acetic acid] ammonium salt (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 908020–52–0);

children.label: B
children.text: 2,3,3,3-tetrafluoro 2–(1,1,2,3,3,3-hexafluoro)–2–(trifluoromethoxy) propanoyl fluoride (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 2479–75–6);

children.label: C
children.text: 2,3,3,3-tetrafluoro 2–(1,1,2,3,3,3-hexafluoro)–2–(trifluoromethoxy) propionic acid (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 2479–73–4);

children.label: D
children.text: 3H-perfluoro-3-[(3-methoxy-propoxy) propanoic acid] (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 919005–14–4);

children.label: E
children.text: the salts associated with the chemical described in subparagraph (D) (Chemical Abstracts Service Nos. 958445–44–8, 1087271–46–2, and NOCAS 892452);

children.label: F
children.text: 1-octanesulfonic acid 3,3,4,4,5,5,6,6,7,7,8,8-tridecafluoro-potassium salt (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 59587–38–1);

children.label: G
children.text: perfluorobutanesulfonic acid (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 375–73–5);

children.label: H
children.text: 1–Butanesulfonic acid, 1,1,2,2,3,3,4,4,4-nonafluoro-potassium salt (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 29420–49–3);

children.label: I
children.text: the component associated with the chemical described in subparagraph (H) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 45187–15–3);

children.label: J
children.text: heptafluorobutyric acid (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 375–22–4);

children.label: K
children.text: perfluorohexanoic acid (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 307–24–4);

children.label: L
children.text: the compound associated with the chemical described in subsection (b)(1)(F) identified by Chemical Abstracts Service No. 2062–98–8;

children.label: M
children.text: perfluoroheptanoic acid (commonly referred to as “PFHpA”) (Chemical Abstracts Service No. 375–85–9);

children.label: N
children.text: each perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances for which a method to measure levels in drinking water has been validated by the Administrator; and

children.label: O
children.text: a perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances other than the chemicals described in subparagraphs (A) through (N) that is used to manufacture fluorinated polymers, as determined by the Administrator.

children.heading: Addition to toxics release inventory
children.label: 3 Addition to toxics release inventory
children.text: Subject to subsection (e), if the Administrator determines under paragraph (1) that a substance or a class of substances described in paragraph (2) meets any one of the criteria described in , the Administrator shall revise the toxics release inventory in accordance with such to include that substance or class of substances not later than 2 years after the date on which the Administrator makes the determination.section 11023(d)(2) of title 42section 11023(d) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: review any such claim of protection from disclosure; and

children.label: B
children.text: require that person to reassert and substantiate or resubstantiate that claim in accordance with .section 2613(f) of this title

children.heading: Nondisclosure of protection information
children.label: 2 Nondisclosure of protection information
children.text: If the Administrator determines that the chemical identity of a perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substance or class of perfluoroalkyl or polyfluoroalkyl substances qualifies for protection from disclosure pursuant to paragraph (1), the Administrator shall include the substance or class of substances, as applicable, on the toxics release inventory in a manner that does not disclose the protected information.
